testcase.name: test_github_returns_full_preview

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ReadTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='japap-refactor.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=20)

testcase.failure:
E TimeoutError: The read operation timed out
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception: E urllib3.exceptions.ReadTimeoutError: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='japap-refactor.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=20)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: E requests.exceptions.ReadTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='japap-refactor.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=20)
